# NEOKUKEY

> NEOKUKEY is an AI & automation studio that designs and builds AI-powered
> systems and automations, helping businesses move smarter, cut manual work,
> and deliver results without friction.

NEOKUKEY ships focused automation projects fast and integrates them end-to-end
across a company's existing tools. Typical outcomes reported on the site:
60–80% reduction in manual work, first deployment in 2–4 weeks, and 15–40 hours
reclaimed per team every week.

Industries served: professional services, e-commerce, logistics, SaaS, and finance.
Languages: English, Русский, Deutsch, Türkçe.

## Services

- **Rapid Automation** — We scope, build, and ship automations in days; most projects are live within two to four weeks.
- **End-to-End Integration** — We connect your systems (APIs, databases, internal tools) so information flows without friction.
- **Reliable by Design** — Every system includes error handling and monitoring so things keep running when you're not watching.
- **Data Pipelines** — Ingestion, transformation, enrichment, and delivery across SQL, APIs, spreadsheets, and documents.
- **AI-driven Workflows** — Document processing, multi-step workflows, and AI-driven decisions.

## Process

1. **Discovery call** — a short call to understand your workflows and goals.
2. **Scoping** — define a focused, high-impact project.
3. **Build in tight iterations** — so you see results early.
4. **Launch** — focused projects ship in 2–4 weeks; larger integrations in 6–10 weeks.
5. **Reliability** — error handling and monitoring are built in from the start.
